title: cert.rs: Ffi{code:-1} used for caller-size BadArgs
description: Four sites in cert.rs use Ffi{code:-1} to report that a caller-supplied slice is too large for a u32 cast: cert_add_trusted (cert.rs:37), cert_verify (cert.rs:112), cert_verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey (cert.rs:147), cert_verify_acert (cert.rs:183). These happen before any FFI call. They should use WolfHsmError::BadArgs{msg:...} matching the same pattern used everywhere else in the codebase for pre-FFI size validation (e.g. cmac.rs:39, aes.rs:47). Suggested rewrite: replace .map_err(|_| WolfHsmError::Ffi{code:-1, func:"..."}) with .map_err(|_| WolfHsmError::BadArgs{msg:"cert exceeds u32::MAX bytes"}) at each of the four sites.
